mapper.select:
SELECT FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.featured = TRUE AND p.status = 'ON_SALE'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_blacklist pb WHERE pb.product_id = p.id AND pb.user_id = #{userId} )
ORDER BY p.sales DESC, p.id ASC LIMIT 8
SELECT FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE status = 'ON_SALE' AND stock <= #{threshold}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (category_id, name, subtitle, description, price, original_price, stock, cover_url, status, featured) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{subtitle}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{coverUrl}, #{status}, #{featured})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, stock = #{stock}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, status = #{status}, featured = #{featured} WHERE id = #{id}
